ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AutoDarkMode/Windows-Auto-Night-Mode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutoDarkMode/Windows-Auto-Night-Mode
Language: c%23
Automatically switches between the dark and light theme of Windows 10 and Windows 11

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BeyondDimension/SteamTools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BeyondDimension/SteamTools
Language: c%23
🛠「Watt Toolkit」是一个开源跨平台的多功能 Steam 工具箱。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Jackett/Jackett
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Jackett/Jackett
Language: c%23
API Support for your favorite torrent trackers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
Language: c%23
Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LavaGang/MelonLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader
Language: c%23
The World's First Universal Mod Loader for Unity Games compatible with both Il2Cpp and Mono

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NickeManarin/ScreenToGif
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NickeManarin/ScreenToGif
Language: c%23
🎬 ScreenToGif allows you to record a selected area of your screen, edit and save it as a gif or video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Perfare/AssetStudio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Perfare/AssetStudio
Language: c%23
AssetStudio is a tool for exploring, extracting and exporting assets and assetbundles.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Prowlarr/Prowlarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr
Language: c%23
Prowlarr is an indexer manager/proxy built on the popular *arr .net/reactjs base stack to integrate with your various PVR apps, supporting management of both Torrent Trackers and Usenet Indexers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babalae/better-genshin-impact
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babalae/better-genshin-impact
Language: c%23
📦BetterGI · 更好的原神 - 自动拾取 | 自动剧情 | 全自动钓鱼(AI) | 全自动七圣召唤 | 自动伐木 | 自动刷本 | 自动采集/挖矿/锄地 | 一条龙 | 全连音游 - UI Automation Testing Tools For Genshin Impact

ns0:entry.ns0:title: btcpayserver/btcpayserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/btcpayserver/btcpayserver
Language: c%23
Accept Bitcoin payments. Free, open-source & self-hosted, Bitcoin payment processor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: d2phap/ImageGlass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/d2phap/ImageGlass
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c%23
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rocksdanister/lively
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rocksdanister/lively
Language: c%23
Free and open-source software that allows users to set animated desktop wallpapers and screensavers powered by WinUI 3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight, open-source control tool for ASUS laptops and ROG Ally. Manage performance modes, fans, GPU, battery, and RGB lighting across Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, and other models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tModLoader/tModLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader
Language: c%23
A mod to make and play Terraria mods. Supports Terraria 1.4 (and earlier) installations
